post_id: string not null
platform: string not null
url: string not null
author_handle: string not null
author_display_name: string
author_verified: bool not null
text: string not null
language: string
language_confidence: double
language_reason: string
published_at: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
extracted_at: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
likes: int64
comments: int64
shares: int64
views: int64
is_repost: bool not null
is_reply: bool not null
parent_post_id: string
entities: list<item: struct<text: string, label: string>> not null
  child 0, item: struct<text: string, label: string>
      child 0, text: string
      child 1, label: string
mentioned_cities: list<item: string> not null
  child 0, item: string
mentioned_mayors: list<item: string> not null
  child 0, item: string
mentioned_governors: list<item: string> not null
  child 0, item: string
mentioned_parties: list<item: string> not null
  child 0, item: string
mentioned_candidates: list<item: string> not null
  child 0, item: string
mentioned_politicians: list<item: string> not null
  child 0, item: string
mentioned_persons: list<item: string> not null
  child 0, item: string
is_rn_relevant: bool not null
sentiment_overall: double
sentiment_by_entity: list<item: struct<entity: string, entity_type: string, sentiment: double, mention_count: int64, sentiment_source: string>> not null
  child 0, item: struct<entity: string, entity_type: string, sentiment: double, mention_count: int64, sentiment_source: string>
      child 0, entity: string
      child 1, entity_type: string
      child 2, sentiment: double
      child 3, mention_count: int64
      child 4, sentiment_source: string
person_id: string
scope_status: string
resolution_confidence: double
sentiment_label: string
confidence_score: double
risk_score: double
decision_factors: list<item: struct<name: string, value: double, weight: double, source: string>> not null
  child 0, item: struct<name: string, value: double, weight: double, source: string>
      child 0, name: string
      child 1, value: double
      child 2, weight: double
      child 3, source: string
content_hash: string not null
actor_run_id: string not null
ingestion_run_id: string not null
rule_version: string
model_version: string
pipeline_version: string
source_type: string not null
batch_id: string not null
author_base_city: string
data_type: string
effective_cutoff_date: timestamp[us, tz=UTC]
identity_resolution_version: string
tenant_id: string
narrative_summary: string
narrative_prompt_version: string
content_rn_relevant: bool
author_in_scope: bool
